title: Brownfield multi-repo coding proof ready for mocked provider

project.name: Existing checkout system
project.goal: Plan a safe checkout change across a bounded multi-repository system
project.system_boundary: checkout web app, order API, and payments adapter repositories

goals: Use existing multi-repo boundary context before proposing code
non_goals: Do not inspect or mutate real repositories
Do not include analytics repository in the coding task
assumptions: The checkout confirmation change touches web copy, order API response shape, and payment callback validation
constraints: Provider output must remain a candidate until reviewed
open_questions: Which repository owns the checkout confirmation copy?

repository_map.title: Analytics export jobs
repository_map.reason: Not needed for the planned coding change

service_boundaries: checkout-web consumes order-api checkout confirmation payload
order-api records payment status emitted by payments-adapter
payments-adapter owns external payment callback validation
build_test_responsibility: checkout-web: build and UI test commands
authority_path: commerce-platform technical lead approves implementation plan before real provider use

task.title: Plan checkout confirmation change
task.prompt: Propose a minimal multi-repo checkout confirmation change plan using only task-relevant repositories.

harness.proposed_output: Update checkout-web display logic, extend the order-api confirmation contract with a backward-compatible field, and add payments-adapter callback tests before any implementation.
